name: cap
title: Cap
description: Control Cap screen recorder directly from Raycast — start, stop, pause, resume recordings and switch inputs without leaving your keyboard.
author: cap

commands.name: start-recording
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Start a new Cap screen recording.

commands.name: stop-recording
commands.title: Stop Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Stop the current Cap screen recording.

commands.name: pause-recording
commands.title: Pause Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Pause the current Cap screen recording.

commands.name: resume-recording
commands.title: Resume Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Resume a paused Cap screen recording.

commands.name: toggle-recording
commands.title: Toggle Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Start recording if idle, or stop if already recording.

commands.name: toggle-pause
commands.title: Toggle Pause / Resume
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Pause recording if active, or resume if paused.

commands.name: restart-recording
commands.title: Restart Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Discard the current recording and start a fresh one.

commands.name: switch-camera
commands.title: Switch Camera
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Choose a camera input for Cap.

commands.name: switch-microphone
commands.title: Switch Microphone
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Choose a microphone input for Cap.
